top3.sql:
SELECT c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.faceName AS card_name, 
    c.artist, 
    MAX(ruling_count) AS ruling_count, 
    CASE WHEN c.isPromo = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_promotional
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    (SELECT uuid, COUNT(*) AS ruling_count 
     FROM rulings 
     GROUP BY uuid) r 
ON 
    c.uuid = r.uuid
ORDER BY 
    r.ruling_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN 
    (SELECT uuid, COUNT(*) AS ruling_count 
     FROM rulings 
     GROUP BY uuid) r 
ON 
    c.uuid = r.uuid

SELECT 
    c.faceName AS card_name, 
    c.artist, 
    COUNT(r.uuid) AS ruling_count, 
    CASE WHEN c.isPromo = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_promotional
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    rulings r 
ON 
    c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.uuid
ORDER BY 
    ruling_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.faceName AS card_name, 
    c.artist, 
    MAX(ruling_count) AS ruling_count, 
    CASE WHEN c.isPromo = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_promotional
FROM 
    cards c
JOIN 
    (SELECT uuid, COUNT(*) AS ruling_count 
     FROM rulings 
     GROUP BY uuid) r 
ON 
    c.uuid = r.uuid
ORDER BY 
    r.ruling_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    c.faceName AS card_name, 
    c.artist, 
    COUNT(r.uuid) AS ruling_count, 
    CASE WHEN c.isPromo = 1 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS is_promotional
FROM 
    cards c
INNER JOIN 
    rulings r 
ON 
    c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY 
    c.uuid, c.faceName, c.artist, c.isPromo
ORDER BY 
    ruling_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
FROM cards c
JOIN rulings r ON c.uuid = r.uuid
GROUP BY c.id, c.asciiName, c.artist, c.isPromo
ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
